accept_predictability.label: UDPNet delta_psnr >= +0.10 dB
accept_predictability.warning: No PSNR/SSIM delta label columns are allowed as router features. Feature source controls whether this is metric-proxy or deployable-feature evidence.

gate_definitions.promotion_gate: strict combined replacement gate; old promotion-style safety constraints

top_hard_experts.notes: Strong hard movement, but preservation/selectivity failed prior gate.
Legacy single-split stop20 evidence; compare cautiously with internal split evidence.
Baseline column is A1, not A0; use only as within-route diagnostic.

top_promotion.notes: Strong hard movement, but preservation/selectivity failed prior gate.
Legacy single-split stop20 evidence; compare cautiously with internal split evidence.

top_utility.notes: Strong hard movement, but preservation/selectivity failed prior gate.
Legacy single-split stop20 evidence; compare cautiously with internal split evidence.

oracle.note: Oracle uses GT PSNR to choose UDPNet if and only if UDPNet beats A0; this is an upper bound, not deployable.

best_posthoc_policy.note: Threshold selected on train folds only for OOF rows; PSNR/SSIM delta labels excluded as router features.

best_posthoc_promotion_policy.note: Threshold selected on train folds only for OOF rows; PSNR/SSIM delta labels excluded as router features.

best_posthoc_utility_policy.note: Threshold selected on train folds only for OOF rows; PSNR/SSIM delta labels excluded as router features.

fixed_policy_candidate.stage: fixed threshold candidate derived from fold-selected policies
fixed_policy_candidate.warning: This is a fixed internal candidate. Locked test still requires route-card closeout and immutable one-shot command.

fold_policies.note: Threshold selected on train folds only for OOF rows; PSNR/SSIM delta labels excluded as router features.
Threshold selected on train folds only for OOF rows; PSNR/SSIM delta labels excluded as router features.
Threshold selected on train folds only for OOF rows; PSNR/SSIM delta labels excluded as router features.
Threshold selected on train folds only for OOF rows; PSNR/SSIM delta labels excluded as router features.
Threshold selected on train folds only for OOF rows; PSNR/SSIM delta labels excluded as router features.

switch.stage: OOF risk-calibrated expert switch threshold diagnostic
switch.warning: Fold thresholds are selected on train folds and applied to held-out fold rows. This is still a threshold diagnostic, not a final learned router.

udp_fam2_oracle.stage: optional A0 + UDPNet + FAM2-confidence oracle alignment
udp_fam2_oracle.warning: FAM2-confidence evidence is from an older stop20 split/protocol. This CSV is an overlap diagnostic only, not a promotion gate.
